## ArrayKey type

Select record keys whose values are optional or required readonly arrays.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ArrayKey<T> = {
    [TKey in keyof T]-?: T[TKey] extends readonly unknown[] | undefined ? TKey : never;
}[keyof T];
```
